Name: -1_fashion_trendy_choose_similar
Representative_Docs: ["What I mean by that is they have a taste similar to mine or one I can appreciate. People who enjoy the same type of books or movies or art.  Though I can understand someone may have exceptional taste and I don't agree with it.  Such as enjoying Rothko's art or Wharton's novels.", 'If I say someone has good taste it means I agree with their sense of style. I think that what they have put together flows well and is cohesive rather than clashes and seems out if place. This applies to fashion and decor. It also might mean they like the same forms of media that I do for the same reasons. Or the same forms of entertainment. It means that I believe that they think similar to me.', 'When I say they have good taste, it usually means that they tends to appreciate subtle details in the object. For example, a person that have a good taste in fashion would dress in a way that elevate their body features and while the fabric/pattern/fit might be eccentric and different then, it would still go together.']

Name: 0_say_mean_usually_food
Representative_Docs: ["Usually when I say someone has good taste, I mean they think like I do and we have similar tastes. That is not always the case, but it's a good barometer.", 'When I say that someone has good taste, it means that in my opinion, the things that person likes is similar to what I like, so, therefore, they have good taste.', "Someone has a good taste in something when they're perceived to like something similar to myself. We see 'good taste' in a certain subject as something that we also enjoy. For example, I would say someone has a good taste in food if I perceive that they like similar foods to me. Having a good taste is subjective and aligns closely with my values."]

Name: 1_art_choices_appreciate_shows
Representative_Docs: ['That their preference of music, art, clothing, movies, etc. is appealing, interesting, fun, exciting, likeable, good to look at or enjoy, or just appealing in every way.', "I would like to acknowledge that there are shows that I watch that are not 'art.' However, I recognize that they are not art. The shows that do transcend the medium and are critically and artistically acknowledged, are considered 'good taste.' Those who enjoy these shows are showing they have good taste.", "They appreciate things like the writing style, colors and shades, and the way they work together. They don't often go for the gaudy or obvious but appreciate the subtleties of art."]

Name: 2_interact_services_selection_style
Representative_Docs: ['It means that they know what is good, in style, good quality, has an eye for art or design and knows the difference between expensive and quality items.', "I think it means that people chose to do or see or say or dress or participate in a way that is morally good and not offensive to other people. They don't like things that are garish. They respect other people and interact with them as they would want others to interact with them. They are not exhibitionists.", 'I believe that it means that they have a good selection of goods or services used by them.  It means other people value those choices and admire their selection of goods or services.  It makes the person more desirable because of a finer choices in life.']
